hotel_name: The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Wadi Desert
raw_description:
Nestled within the vast expanse of the Al Wadi Nature Reserve, The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Wadi Desert is a serene sanctuary where timeless Arabian heritage is seamlessly woven with refined luxury. Guests are invited to retreat to one of 101 elegantly appointed villas, each offering a private pool, expansive deck, and captivating views of golden dunes or lush desert landscapes.

 For the pinnacle of privacy, the 8 Signature Villas redefine indulgence with expansive living spaces, bespoke amenities, sunset cocktail rituals, and dedicated butler service. Rooted in nature and rich traditions, the resort’s immersive experiences connect guests to the soul of the desert. 

From falconry and horseback riding to archery, stargazing, and camel treks, every moment celebrates the spirit of place. At the heart of wellbeing, The Rainforest, one of the UAE’s largest hydrothermal sanctuaries offers an unforgettable 16-station journey blending European hydrotherapy with ancient Middle Eastern bathing rituals. Culinary experiences abound at The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Wadi Desert, beginning with Farmhouse By Syrco, where conscious gastronomy and sustainable local produce meet culinary artistry. 

Kaheela invites guests to savor authentic flavors with a selection of international and Middle Eastern favorites served in a warm, welcoming ambiance, while Paddock Café provides a tranquil escape for light, wholesome bites overlooking serene paddocks and stables. Adding to the resort’s rich culinary tapestry is Gobi, a Pan-Asian restaurant inspired by the five Chinese elements, offering a multi-sensory journey through bold flavors and refined presentation in a contemporary desert setting.

 From destination dining beneath starlit skies to sunrise yoga in the dunes, The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Wadi Desert is a canvas for unforgettable moments in a setting of natural beauty and elevated luxury.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.5for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at The Ritz-Carlton Ras Al Khaimah, Al Wadi Desert. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
